DatalabUIFieldExtra.description: UI rendering hints attached to a field via ``json_schema_extra={"datalab_ui": {...}}``.

include_field_in_summary.description: Also show this field in list/summary views.
include_field_in_summary.title: Include Field In Summary

hidden.description: Store but don't render this field (e.g. a companion unit field).
hidden.title: Hidden

multiline.description: Render a string as a multi-line textarea.
multiline.title: Multiline

section.description: Group fields sharing this section string into their own card.
section.title: Section

ref_types.description: Render an item-reference widget restricted to these item types.
ref_types.title: Ref Types

unit_field.description: Companion field holding the unit; renders a value box + unit dropdown.
unit_field.title: Unit Field

DatalabUIFieldExtra.title: DatalabUIFieldExtra

description: Datalab hints attached to a field via ``json_schema_extra``.

datalab_ui.description: UI rendering hints consumed by the web app's custom-fields panel.

datalab_exclude_from_db.description: Don't persist this field to the database (block models).
datalab_exclude_from_db.title: Datalab Exclude From Db

datalab_exclude_from_load.description: Don't populate this field when loading from the database (block models).
datalab_exclude_from_load.title: Datalab Exclude From Load

title: DatalabFieldExtra
